item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
plan='longhorizon-work/scenario-06/migration/plan.json'
docs='longhorizon-work/scenario-06/docs/migration.md'
check_pair() {
  json_value=\""'$1"
  docs_line="$2"
  label="$3"
  actual=$(jq -r "$json_value" "$plan")
  rg -F -x -- "$docs_line" "$docs" >/dev/null
  printf '"'%s=AGREES (%s)\\n' \""'$label" "$actual"
}
check_pair '"'.schema_version' '- Schema version: "'`1`'"' schema_version
check_pair '.strategy' '- Strategy: "'`big_bang`'"' strategy
check_pair '.batch_size' '- Batch size: "'`25`'"' batch_size
check_pair '.rollback_error_rate' '- Rollback error rate: "'`0.02`'"' rollback_error_rate
check_pair '.dry_run_first' '- Dry run first: "'`true`'"' dry_run_first
check_pair '.owner' '- Owner: "'`data-platform`'"' owner
jq -e '.safety_conditions == [\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
rg -F '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
printf '"'legacy_id_phase_3=AGREES\\n'
printf 'RECONCILIATION_RESULT=NO_CHANGE_REQUIRED\\n'"

batch_size=AGREES (25)
rollback_error_rate=AGREES (0.02)

owner=AGREES (data-platform)
legacy_id_phase_3=AGREES
RECONCILIATION_RESULT=NO_CHANGE_REQUIRED
